behavior_summaries./home2/mynames/Documents/NPMAnalysis/Dat: Spawns child processes and allows remote code evaluation via IPC, which can be abused for arbitrary code execution.
Allows remote code execution via broadcastEval and _eval message handling.
Contains dynamic code execution via eval, allowing arbitrary code execution at runtime.
Performs file system reads and arbitrary HTTP(S) requests, potentially allowing data exfiltration or remote code/data loading.
Establishes WebSocket connections, processes and transmits arbitrary data, and unpacks/executes binary payloads using erlpack/zlib.
